name: Elevation utilities
description: Box-shadow utilities that lift an element off the surface (or press it in). Values bind to the elevation token scale, including inner-shadow variants.

families.name: shadow
families.description: Applies a box-shadow from the elevation scale, including inner shadows.
guidance: Use elevation to signal layering (raised cards, popovers), not decoration; keep the scale consistent so higher elements read as closer.
Inner shadows (shadow-inner*) press an element into the surface — use for wells and insets, not raised surfaces.
families.a11y: Elevation is a visual affordance only; never rely on shadow alone to convey state — pair it with a non-visual cue.
